FR. 384 (a) atte 22 aaqax, 2003, ar.ar.ft. 66 (4) area 15 Heat 2006, ar-ar.fA. 498 (a1), arte 23 erred, 2006 atx atar. fA. 96 (a) arehe 22 wraet 2010 & rer anita PHU TT gs, MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY BOARD) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th September, 2015 G.S.R.711(E) .----In exercise of the powers conferred to by section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in Schedule I, for serial number 17 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and the entries shall be substituted, namely:- “17. Secunderabad Andhra Pradesh and Telangana”. [No. 2012/TC(RCT)/1-5] ASHOK CHOWDRRY, Adviser, (Public Grievances, Railway Board) EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM With a view to implement the provisions of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (6 of 2014) whereby a new State, Telangana, has been formed from the State of Andhra Pradesh with effect from the and June, 2014, the existing entry in Schedule I under serial number 17 in respect of the executive jurisdiction of Secunderabad Bench of Railway Claims is being amended to include the two States of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana under the executive jurisdiction of Secunderabad Bench of the Railway Claims Tribunal. Foot Note.----The principal rules were published vide notification number G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19" September, 1989 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R 700 (E), dated the 26" November, 1991, G.S.R. 438 (E), dated the 21“ April, 1992, G.S.R. 509 (E), dated the 15"" June, 1994, G.S.R. 270 (E), dated the 4" July, 1996, G.S.R. 59 (E), dated the 4" February, 1997, G.S.R. 719 (E), dated the 15" October, 1999, G.S.R. 167 (E), dated the 29" February, 2000, G.S.R. 513 (E), dated the gh July, 2001, G.S.R. 787 (E), dated the 2nd December, 2002, G.S.R. 384 (E), dated the 22"* October, 2003, G.S.R. 66 (E), dated the 15" February, 2006, G.S.R. 498(E), dated the 23" August, 2006 and G.S.R.96(E) dated the 22m February, 2010.
